data.title: China's intelligent vehicle EEA market sees growth with 802,000 cars adopting domain fusion architectures in 2025H1.
data.description: A report titled "Intelligent Vehicle Electronic and Electrical Architecture (EEA) and Technology Supply Chain Construction Strategy Research Report, 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report highlights that in the first half of 2025, 802,000 passenger cars were equipped with domain fusion architectures, accounting for 7.6% of total sales. Additionally, 640,000 cars featured quasi-central + zonal architectures. A total of 24 OEMs were identified as deploying innovative products ranging from platform architectures to technical selling points.

data.title: Sprott Physical Uranium Trust updates equity program to issue up to $1.0 billion of units in Canada.
data.description: Sprott Asset Management LP, a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., announced an updated at-the-market equity program for the Sprott Physical Uranium Trust (TSX: U.UN) (TSX: U.U) on January 26, 2026. The Trust, established as a non-redeemable investment fund focusing on physical uranium assets, is now authorized to issue up to U.S.$1.0 billion worth of Trust Units in Canada.

data.title: Record $3.4 billion crypto theft in 2025 prompts shift from exchanges to Bitcoin ETFs, with $400 million stolen from Coinbase.
data.description: In May 2025, Coinbase faced a unique security breach where cybercriminals obtained personal details of account owners and tricked them into transferring money to fake wallets, resulting in an estimated theft of $400 million. A California artist lost over $2 million to these scammers with no way of recovery. The total cryptocurrency theft in 2025 was $3.4 billion, surpassing the previous year. Bybit exchange experienced a significant theft of roughly 400,000 Ethereum. This trend highlights the vulnerability of crypto wallets and exchanges, prompting a shift towards regulated asset managers offering secure options. Security incidents emphasize the need for improved infrastructure in the cryptocurrency sector to restore investor confidence. Data suggests a growing interest in regulated Bitcoin ETFs as a secure investment option, with net inflows of $26 billion in 2025.

data.title: Strategy Inc. buys 2,932 Bitcoin for $264M; average cost $90,061 per Bitcoin; total holdings $62.5B; $8.3B in paper gains; holds 3.4% of supply.
data.description: Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) has recently purchased a total of 2,932 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) for $264.1 million. Despite this acquisition, the company's stock dropped to $161 on Monday morning. The average price paid for each Bitcoin in this transaction was $90,061, significantly higher than their overall cost basis of $76,037 per Bitcoin for their total holdings of 712,647 BTC. The purchase was funded by selling 1,569,770 shares of Class A common stock for $257 million and 70,201 shares of STRC preferred stock for $7 million through at-the-market offerings. With this purchase, the company's Bitcoin holdings are now valued at approximately $62.5 billion at current rates, originally acquired for $54.2 billion - reflecting around $8.3 billion in unrealized gains. Strategy Inc. now possesses about 3.4% of Bitcoin's total 21 million supply. Furthermore, the company still has $8.17 billion in cash reserves.

data.title: ADA price aims for $0.43 by Feb with current $0.35 trade. Careful strategy needed amid mixed signals.
data.description: Cardano (ADA) is currently priced at $0.35 with conflicting signals. Market analysis indicates a possible increase to the $0.43 level, but prevailing bearish trends highlight the need for cautious investment strategies.

data.title: PROtect opens new location in North Dakota, serving Upper Midwest, Northern Plains. Expands reach to more customers.
data.description: PROtect, LLC, a renowned provider of safety, reliability, and compliance solutions, unveiled the establishment of a new regional office in North Dakota. This strategic move enhances the company's capacity to cater to clients in the Upper Midwest and Northern Plains regions. The expansion signifies a significant milestone in PROtect's growth trajectory.

data.title: Florida Realtors® is offering a Student Scholarship Program for students interested in real estate-related careers.
data.description: Discover more about the Student Scholarship Program provided by Florida Realtors® for college students and high school graduates interested in real estate careers. This initiative aims to support students pursuing careers in the real estate industry. The program offers scholarships to assist with educational expenses and career development opportunities. If you have children in college or soon-to-be high school graduates looking to explore real estate-related professions, this program could be beneficial for them. Apply now to take advantage of this opportunity.

data.title: Gold hits new record above $5,100 as Ethereum lags below $3,000; predicted by market users months ago.
data.description: The price of gold surged past $5,100, while Ethereum struggled to stay below $3,000. Prediction market participants had accurately forecasted these trends months in advance.
